briefdescription.para: Initialize the state manager (called by CATChemCore)
Finalize the state manager (alias for cleanup)
Mark the state manager as configured.
Get pointer to config manager for modification.
Set the config manager to use an external instance.
Get pointer to met state for modification.
Get pointer to time state for modification.
Get pointer to chem state for modification.
Set pointer to diagnostic manager (called by CATChemCore)
Create virtual column for grid position (i,j)

detaileddescription.para: Creates a virtual column data container and populates it with data from the 3D grid at position (i,j)

briefdescription.para: Apply virtual column changes back to 3D state.

detaileddescription.para: Updates 3D state arrays with modified virtual column data
Uses VirtualMetType with direct pointers to MetState fields

briefdescription.para: Get approximate memory usage in bytes.
Simplified state container managed by CATChemCore.

detaileddescription.para: This type provides basic state object management. Complex lifecycle operations are handled by CATChemCore_Mod.
